findings.evidence: Lines 136-139 and 159-162 contain the needed equalities as local `have hmap`; grep shows no public declaration for these equalities, only the totally-real theorems at lines 132 and 155.
findings.fix: Expose the two map-normal-form lemmas, e.g. `map_prod_top_bot_standardComplexStructure` and `map_prod_bot_top_standardComplexStructure`, and mark them `@[simp]` if they simplify in the intended direction.
findings.issue: The image of each coordinate factor under `LinearMap.standardComplexStructure` is proved only as a local `hmap`, so downstream users cannot rewrite the standard model's `J`-image without redoing the proof.

summary: The new surface exposes the core predicate and standard model, but it does not expose enough characteristic API to use the standard doubled model without reproving private facts.
